name: POC — Unlimited Capital Experiment
description: Same rules, ₹10 crore starting capital (effectively unlimited for ₹30-70k tier sizes). Measures raw signal yield and per-rupee return without cash constraint.
experiment_notes: Cash constraint at Gate 6 effectively disabled (₹10 crore >> tier sizes)
Gate 9 (sector cap = 2 per sector) STILL ENFORCED -> max ~28 concurrent positions
Real-world caveat: ₹10cr deployed on midcaps would have 0.5-2% market impact — NOT modeled
